title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. cilentanum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. cilentanum, also known as a subspecies of Hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues due to its bioactive compounds. Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. cilentanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
